title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while out and about with Winning
Ticket...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! It's so fun to hang out with you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following her gaze as she yells, I see a bunch of
claw machines packed with plush toys.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm happy as can be, 'cause I've got you to hang
out with...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But what about those cuties? If nobody takes
them home, won't they be stuck in there forever?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaah! That's so saaad! We have to save them!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that she's grown attached to the plushies, I
can see her crying over their lonesome fate for
the rest of the day...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Woohoo, Trainer! I'll be cheering you on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
